news.summary: CorVel Corporation (NASDAQ: CRVL) reported its financial results for the quarter and fiscal year that ended on March 31, 2025. In the quarter, revenues reached $232 million, marking an increase from $207 million in the same period of 2024. Earnings per share for the quarter stood at $0.51, up from $0.37 year-over-year. For the fiscal year ended March 31, 2025, revenues totaled $896 million, surpassing the $795 million recorded in the prior fiscal year. Earnings per share for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2025 were $1.83, an increase from $1.47 reported in the fiscal year that ended on March 31, 2024. Notably, the earnings per share figures for both years have been adjusted to account for the three-for-one stock split of common stock that occurred on December 24, 2024.
news.headline: CorVel Corp's Q1 revenues reached $232M, up from $207M in 2024; earnings per share were $0.51 vs $0.37. Annual revenues hit $896M, up from $795M in 2024; earnings per share were $1.83 vs $1.47. Adjusted EPS due to Dec 24, 2024, stock split.

news.summary: TD Bank Group reported its earnings for the second quarter ended April 30, 2025. Reported net income was $11.1 billion, up 334% compared to the same period last year, with adjusted net income at $3.6 billion, down 4%. Diluted earnings per share were $6.27 compared to $1.35 last year, and adjusted diluted earnings per share were $1.97 compared to $2.04. For the six months ended April 30, reported net income was $13.9 billion, up from $5.4 billion, and adjusted net income was $7.2 billion, down from $7.4 billion. TD Bank's Strategic Review includes adjusting business mix and capital allocation, simplifying portfolios, evolving operations, and driving innovation for efficiency. The Bank will update on its medium-term financial targets in the later part of 2025.
news.headline: TD Bank Group reported Q2 2025 results: net income $11.1B (334% increase YoY), adjusted net income $3.6B (4% decrease). Diluted earnings per share: $6.27, adjusted $1.97. Reported revenue $22.9B, net interest income $8.1B. Full story on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: A joint report from Binance Pay and Travala revealed that travelers using cryptocurrency for booking arrangements spend more than double the amount of regular travelers using fiat money. Crypto-based bookings on Travala reached $80 million in 2024, up from $45 million the year before, with crypto travelers spending an average of $1,211 per transaction compared to $469 by fiat users. Crypto users were also shown to be three times more valuable over their lifetime due to longer stays and higher repeat bookings. The report highlighted that crypto users were 57% more likely to make a repeat hotel purchase. The main draw for using crypto for travel was its borderless, global utility, allowing travelers to avoid currency exchange lines and foreign transaction fees. Airlines integrating digital currencies into their booking systems saw a 40% boost in bookings, with travel and hospitality representing 14% of all crypto transactions in 2024. Travala, founded in 2017, enables users to pay for flights, hotel stays, and tours with 141 different cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin and USDC via Binance Pay. The growth in crypto ownership at a compound annual rate of 99% far outpaced traditional payment methods' growth, with 65% of crypto owners expressing interest in using it for payments. As the crypto holder base expands, more retailers are accepting digital currencies for everyday transactions, with examples ranging from luxury goods to fast food outlets. Payments with Binance Pay are confirmed within seconds due to its off-chain, closed-loop payment solution, avoiding extended delays and network fees associated with some other methods.
news.headline: Crypto travelers spend 2.5x more ($1,211 avg) than fiat, totaling $80M in 2024 on Travala. They bring 3x greater lifetime value.

news.summary: San Diego-based Ceresti Health, a prominent tech-enabled dementia care provider in the US, has introduced a digital waitlist for individuals across all 50 states who are on traditional Medicare and whose family caregivers wish to enroll in Medicare's cost-free dementia care initiative. This program, named the Guiding an Improved Dementia Experience (GUIDE) Model, is set to commence on July 1, 2025. The initiative by the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) Innovation Center aims to expand the availability of vital assistance for individuals coping with dementia.
news.headline: Ceresti Health offers waitlist for Medicare's free dementia care program for traditional Medicare beneficiaries before July 2025.

news.summary: In a significant development in global commerce and AI technology, Glance, a prominent consumer tech company supported by Google, has introduced Glance AI, an advanced AI-centered commerce platform incorporating its latest proprietary AI models. Glance AI aims to transform the shopping experience and redefine the role of intelligence in driving decisions and economies worldwide. Going beyond traditional search methods, Glance AI offers a discovery-centric approach to online shopping, revolutionizing the way people shop. This launch signifies the rise of the ‘AI c...
news.headline: Glance AI launches a new AI commerce platform to transform online shopping experience, backed by Google.

news.summary: In Charlotte, NC, Krispy Kreme® is honoring the Class of 2025 on May 28 by offering FREE Original Glazed® three-packs and a special “Dough-ploma” inspired by the book "Oh, the Places You’ll Go!" by Dr. Seuss. On this day, any high school or college senior wearing their Class of 2025 cap and gown or senior swag will receive a FREE Original Glazed® three-pack with no purchase necessary, while supplies last. This promotion is part of a celebration for the graduating class and aims to recognize their achievements.
news.headline: Krispy Kreme offers free donuts on May 28 for Class of 2025 with 'Dough-ploma'. Seniors in Class of 2025 can get free 3-pack donuts with cap and gown.

news.summary: Dorian LPG Ltd., a prominent owner and operator of modern very large gas carriers (VLGCs), based in Stamford, Conn., announced its financial outcomes for the quarter and fiscal year closing on March 31, 2025. In recent developments, the company disclosed an unusual cash dividend of $0.50 per share of its common stock, amounting to $21.3 million. This dividend is set to be disbursed around May 30, 2025, to all shareholders recorded at the end of the business period.
news.headline: Dorian LPG Ltd. reports Q4 and FY 2025 financial results, declaring $0.50 dividend per share totaling $21.3 million.

news.summary: FIFA has decided to move its NFT platform to a new blockchain based on Avalanche, severing its connections with Algorand and Polygon. This transition will involve switching all operations and transactions to the new platform, indicating a significant shift in the organization's blockchain strategy. The migration to the Avalanche-based blockchain demonstrates FIFA's commitment to exploring new technologies and improving its NFT ecosystem. This move highlights the increasing popularity of Avalanche in the blockchain space and underscores FIFA's dedication to staying at the forefront of innovation.
news.headline: FIFA moves NFT platform to Avalanche blockchain, severing ties with Algorand & Polygon.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, CME Group, the top derivatives marketplace globally, revealed that FX Spot+ achieved a remarkable milestone by facilitating over $1.4 billion in trades in spot and FX futures in a single day through implied matching technology on May 12, 2025. This accomplishment comes within the first month of operation and highlights the platform's rapid growth and acceptance within the market.
news.headline: CME Group's FX Spot+ platform sees $1.4B traded in a day with 40+ clients, marking strong start in first month.

news.summary: ASC50, an oral small molecule interleukin-17 (IL-17) inhibitor developed in-house, is designed for treating various autoimmune and inflammatory conditions like psoriasis. In non-human primates, ASC50 displayed increased drug exposure and longer duration after oral administration. This potential drug aims to address numerous autoimmune and inflammatory diseases, with a focus on improving treatment outcomes for patients.
news.headline: Ascletis' ASC50, an oral IL-17 inhibitor, gains FDA clearance for psoriasis treatment, promising better outcomes.

news.summary: Glendale, Arizona, on May 22, 2025 - The Alkaline Water Company Inc. (OTC: WTER) ("WTER"), a significant player in the beverage sector, recognized for its purified alkaline water products, has revealed its comeback in the Phoenix market. The company will be placing its products at various locations across the city in order to reach a wider audience.
news.headline: Alkaline Water Co. (OTC: WTER) reenters Phoenix market with leading grocer, placing products.

news.summary: In Boise, Idaho, on May 22, 2025, Inspire Investing, known as the leading provider of faith-based ETFs globally, was recognized for its workplace culture. news.headline: Inspire Investing wins 2nd place in Idaho 2025 for small employers by Best Places to Work in Idaho.

news.summary: The IONIQ 5 XRT has been awarded as the Best Electrified Activity Vehicle and Best Two-Row Family SUV by Northwest Automotive Press Association judges. In a testing process involving 21 crossovers, SUVs, and pickups, the IONIQ 5 XRT stood out on both on-pavement and off-road performance. This model is assembled at the newly established Hyundai Motor Group Metaplant America located in Georgia. This recognition showcases the quality and capabilities of the IONIQ 5 XRT, marking a significant achievement for Hyundai in the automotive industry.
news.headline: Hyundai IONIQ 5 XRT wins two awards at NWAPA 2025 Mudfest, named Best Electrified Activity Vehicle and Best Two-Row Family SUV.

news.headline: Cambridge partners with iCapital to offer more alternative investments to 3,800 financial professionals and high-net-worth clients.

news.summary: Today in Shanghai, Atour Lifestyle Holdings Limited, a prominent hospitality and lifestyle company in China traded on NASDAQ under the ticker ATAT, revealed plans to boost shareholder value. The Board of Directors declared a dividend in accordance with the three-year Annual Dividend Policy implemented in August 2024. Additionally, they approved a three-year Share Repurchase Program, allocating up to US$400 million for this initiative.
news.headline: Atour Lifestyle Holdings declares dividend under annual policy, authorizes share repurchase program of up to $400M.

news.summary: Wishpond's AI-driven sales agent, SalesCloser AI, has reached an impressive milestone with $1 million in Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR), making it the Company's fastest-growing product in terms of ARR to date. Anticipated revenue growth in the latter half of 2025 is expected to be driven significantly by this achievement.
news.headline: Wishpond's SalesCloser AI reached $1M ARR(1), leading in growth. Anticipates revenue growth in 2H 2025.

news.summary: Accountants and certified public accountants are bidding farewell to outsourcing as ezPaycheck revolutionizes payroll processes, significantly reducing overhead costs. Recent reports reveal that CPAs, small and medium-sized businesses, and accountants have been able to save a considerable amount of their business finances by transitioning to ezPaycheck. This cost-effective solution has been adopted widely, with notable reductions in overhead expenses reported across the board. The shift to ezPaycheck in Redmond, Wash., as of May 22, 2025, has brought about remarkable financial benefits for professionals and businesses in the industry.
news.headline: ezPaycheck lowers operating costs for accountants and CPAs, saving substantial amount by using this payroll solution.

news.summary: Zentiva, a pharmaceutical company, showed its support for fair access to medicines by participating in Euractiv's Health Policy Conference in Brussels. The conference took place on May 22, 2025, and featured Zentiva's CEO, Steffen Saltofte, among senior EU policymakers. The event included an opening panel discussion on "The EU Pharmaceutical Legislation," emphasizing the importance of healthcare policies. Such initiatives are crucial to ensuring equitable access to medicines for all individuals. This demonstrates Zentiva's commitment to contributing to the dialogue on improving healthcare systems.
news.headline: Zentiva and Euractiv host health policy conference in Brussels with CEO Steffen Saltofte, aiming for fair medicine access.
